chapters.title: 摘要
chapters.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"摘要"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"本文研究了基于深度学习的图像识别技术。"}]}]}

chapters.title: Abstract
chapters.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Abstract"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"This paper studies image recognition based on deep learning."}]}]}

chapters.title: 绪论
chapters.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"绪论"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"研究背景与意义。本文提出了一种新的方法，"},{"type":"figureRef","attrs":{"figureAlt":"系统架构图"}},{"type":"text","text":"展示了系统的整体结构。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"相关研究表明，深度学习在图像识别领域取得了显著进展"},{"type":"citation","attrs":{"referenceId":"ref-1"}},{"type":"text","text":"。同时，神经网络架构的发展也推动了分类准确率的提升"},{"type":"citation","attrs":{"referenceId":"ref-2"}},{"type":"text","text":"。"}]},{"type":"paragraph"},{"type":"image","attrs":{"src":"data:image/png;base64,","alt":"系统架构图","title":""}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"研究背景"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"深度学习近年来取得了显著进展。"}]}]}

chapters.title: 结论
chapters.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"结论"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"本文提出了新的方法，实验证明有效。"}]}]}
